raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased an activity ticket from XXXX on [ insert date ] for {$140.00}. When I arrived at the attraction, the QR code would not scan, and the staff informed me that XXXX is not an authorized reseller. I was denied entry and forced to purchase a second ticket directly from a legitimate provider to participate in the activity. 

I filed a dispute with American Express ( Dispute ID : XXXX ) and provided substantial evidence, including emails from XXXX admitting their supplier caused the issue, confirmation from the attraction that XXXX tickets are not accepted, photos showing the XXXX XXXX failure, and proof of my second ticket purchase. 

Despite this, American Express closed the dispute in favor of the merchant, citing only the merchants claim that the QR code is scannable and stating they could not influence the merchant. They rebilled the charge to my account without conducting a reasonable investigation or addressing the evidence I provided. 

This left me with both financial loss and no resolution, even though I never received the service I paid for.
